name: Politis, D. and Romano, J.P. (1992) A Circular Block Resampling

name: The stationary block bootstrap in SAS - The DO Loop
snippet: This article is the third of a series. It shows how to perform a stationary block bootstrap by randomly sampling blocks of residuals.
